# I18n Workflow

This file is generated by the local i18n workflow scripts.

- `node ./i18n/cli.mts manifest sync` / `node ./i18n/cli.mts webviews sync` / `node ./i18n/cli.mts formatter sync` / `node ./i18n/cli.mts quickpicks sync` refresh extraction outputs.
- `node ./i18n/cli.mts manifest promote` / `node ./i18n/cli.mts webviews promote` / `node ./i18n/cli.mts formatter promote` / `node ./i18n/cli.mts quickpicks promote` promote approved translations into authority.
- `node ./i18n/cli.mts manifest generate` / `node ./i18n/cli.mts webviews generate` / `node ./i18n/cli.mts formatter generate` / `node ./i18n/cli.mts quickpicks generate` generate localized artifacts from authority.
- `node ./i18n/cli.mts manifest package` builds production assets from the real repository root, generates manifest staging, disables staged `vscode:prepublish`, and packages from `.work/i18n/extension-root/zh-cn`.
- VS Code `Run` and `Watch & Run` launch configurations generate manifest staging and use `.work/i18n/extension-root/zh-cn` as `--extensionDevelopmentPath` so manifest UI is read from staged localization artifacts.
- Extension builds run the runtime dynamic source generator and inject `.work/i18n/runtime-dynamic-sources/zh-cn/{formatter,quickpicks}/**` through webpack without editing upstream `src/**` call sites.
